items.name: 大條家茶室 此君亭
items.location: 山元町坂元字舘下／坂本要害（蓑首城）三ノ丸跡

en.description_en: The Ōeda family tea house named Shikuntei, classified as a tangible cultural property (building). It is town-designated by Yamamoto. Located at Sakamoto aza Tateshita, on the third bailey site of Sakamoto Fort (Minokubi Castle), Yamamoto.
